citation.description: _NON_COMPLETION_BUG_CLASSES frozenset + _has_live_replacement_link function require BOTH the non-completion class AND a live replacement link (outbound 'duplicates' or inbound 'supersedes'). Lines 68-69 guard on both conditions simultaneously.

criteria.criterion: SCOPE REFINEMENT (acceptance criterion): the completion verifier must be skipped for a duplicate/supersedes closure IF AND ONLY IF the ticket carries a VALID 'supersedes' or 'duplicates' link to another ticket. It is NOT a blanket exemption for the --class value alone: a --class duplicate/not_a_bug/escalated close with NO valid superseding/duplicating link MUST still run completion verification.

citation.description: _has_live_replacement_link is called with ticket_id, ticket_type, close_class, tracker and its True return causes early return None (skip verification) before the LLM call.

criteria.criterion: The exemption is gated on the existence of a valid link to another ticket, not on the class string — called from _completion_precheck before the billable LLM verifier.

citation.description: _is_live_ticket returns False when resolve_ticket_id returns None, when reduce_ticket raises, when state has an error, or when status is archived/deleted. The archived_duplicate_target test case in test_completion_link_exemptions.py validates this path.

criteria.criterion: A missing, reversed, unlinked, unresolved, archived, or deleted replacement does not bypass verification (fail-closed on bad/dangling links).

citation.description: Parametrized test covers 6 shapes: replacement_supersedes_bug (positive), bug_duplicates_canonical (positive), no_relation/missing (negative), bug_supersedes_replacement/wrong-direction (negative), archived_duplicate_target/dangling (negative), duplicate_link_wrong_class/mismatched-class (negative).

criteria.criterion: Positive/negative lifecycle tests covering missing, dangling, wrong-direction, and mismatched-class links.

citation.description: cli-reference.md line 392: 'With the completion gate enabled, duplicate/not_a_bug/escalated skips verification only when this bug duplicates a live ticket or a live ticket supersedes this bug.' Also documented in docs/ticket-model.md lines 79-83.

criteria.criterion: CLI documentation covers the rule (duplicate/not_a_bug/escalated skips verification only when valid link exists).

citation.description: The fix inserts _has_live_replacement_link check before the billable LLM call and returns None (skip) when the condition is satisfied. The old path (always running verify_completion for every non-force bug close) is no longer taken for valid replacement-linked closes.

criteria.criterion: Bug: completion verification was always run even for duplicate/superseded closes — now correctly skipped when a live replacement link exists.
